studies.title: Personalized digital training intervention to reduce inflammation by correcting pathological movement patterns in pre-stage knee osteoarthritis (OA)

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the re.flex system, a sensor-based technology developed by Kineto Tech Rehab, as the intervention being tested. This matches the description of the digital therapeutic product re.flex.

_classification.reason: The document describes a study protocol for a digital training intervention but does not provide results. Protocols without results are classified as INELIGIBLE.

studies._rejection_reason: The document describes a study protocol for a digital training intervention but does not provide results. Protocols without results are classified as INELIGIBLE.
